<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
 <defs>
  <radialGradient id="bulge" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="30%">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff2a8"/>
    <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#ffc86b"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff7b4d" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
  </radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="bg" cx="30%" cy="20%" r="100%">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#071126"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b1020"/>
  </radialGradient>
  <linearGradient id="armGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8bd3ff"/>
    <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#9b8bff"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff8bd1"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
    <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="blur"/>

      <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
      <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>

  </filter>
 </defs>
 <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bg)"/>
